_comment: Copy this file to config.json and fill in your credentials.
_comment_buff: Optional: paste an existing Buff.market session cookie here to skip re-login on startup. Leave blank to auto-login via Steam OpenID every time.
_comment_steam: Your Steam account credentials and mobile authenticator secrets (from the .maFile exported by Steam Desktop Authenticator or similar).
_comment_game: Game to monitor: csgo, dota2, tf2, rust
_comment_proxy: SOCKS5 proxy for Buff HTTP requests. Set steam_use_proxy=true to also route Steam through it.
user_agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/136.0.0.0 Safari/537.36
_comment_polling: Polling intervals in seconds. Lower values = faster response but more API load.
_comment_session: How often (seconds) to verify session validity. Regular API activity keeps the session alive implicitly; auth errors trigger immediate reauth. Default 864000 = 10 days.
